input.question: What is the average GPA per department?

payload.question: What is the average GPA per department?

output.reasoning: Computed department-level average by joining departments -> courses -> course_sections -> enrollments -> grades, casting grade_value to numeric and excluding non-numeric/null grades. Results ordered deterministically by department_name and averaged to 3 decimals.
output.sql:
WITH dept_gpa AS (
  SELECT d.id AS department_id,
         d.name AS department_name,
         AVG((g.grade_value)::numeric) AS average_gpa
  FROM public.departments AS d
  JOIN public.courses AS c ON c.department_id = d.id
  JOIN public.course_sections AS cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments AS e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades AS g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
    AND g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT department_id,
       department_name,
       ROUND(average_gpa::numeric, 3) AS avg_gpa
FROM dept_gpa
ORDER BY department_name;
assumptions: grade_value contains GPA as a numeric string (e.g., '4.5'); non-numeric or NULL grade_value rows are excluded
Average includes all enrollments with an associated grade (no filter by semester/year)
department id is public.departments.id and joins follow courses.department_id -> course_sections.course_id -> enrollments.course_section_id -> grades.enrollment_id

payload.sql:
WITH dept_gpa AS (
  SELECT d.id AS department_id,
         d.name AS department_name,
         AVG((g.grade_value)::numeric) AS average_gpa
  FROM public.departments AS d
  JOIN public.courses AS c ON c.department_id = d.id
  JOIN public.course_sections AS cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments AS e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades AS g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
    AND g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT department_id,
       department_name,
       ROUND(average_gpa::numeric, 3) AS avg_gpa
FROM dept_gpa
ORDER BY department_name;
